meta.title: Team — Certified Environmental Experts | BTH Expert
meta.description: Meet the BTH Expert team. Engineers and experts certified by the Algerian Ministry of Environment. Managing Director: Amine Lahmer. Based in Oran.

hero.heading: Our team
hero.subheading: BTH Expert comprises accredited engineers and specialists with in-depth mastery of the Algerian regulatory framework and international best practice in environmental studies.

members.name: Amine Lahmer
members.bio: An environmental engineer holding a Master's from École de technologie supérieure (ÉTS, Montréal), Amine Lahmer built his expertise within leading international engineering groups — including AtkinsRéalis — and on complex industrial projects across Algeria and Canada. Certified by Sonatrach/Institut Algérien du Pétrole, he combines deep knowledge of Algerian regulatory frameworks with international best practices in impact assessment, hazard studies and industrial risk management. He co-founded BTH Expert to bring world-class environmental expertise to Algerian industry.

partner.heading: BTH Consult partnership
partner.description: For regional or national-scale projects, BTH Expert operates in strategic partnership with BTH Consult, strengthening the intervention capacity and expertise mobilised for each assignment.

cta.heading: Let's work together
cta.description: Contact our team to discuss your environmental project.

meta.title: Services — Environmental Studies & HSE | BTH Expert

hero.heading: Our environmental services
hero.subheading: Four core service lines to support your regulatory obligations, from project inception to operational phase.

meta.title: Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) in Algeria — BTH Expert
meta.description: Certified consultancy for environmental impact assessments (EIA) in Algeria. Reports compliant with Ministry of Environment requirements. Based in Oran.

hero.heading: Environmental Impact Assessment
hero.subheading: An EIA is the regulatory document that evaluates a project's impacts on its natural, human and socio-economic environment. It is mandatory for all projects subject to impact assessment under Algerian law.

why.heading: Who is required to submit one?
why.description: Any owner of an industrial, mining, agricultural or infrastructure project listed among the works subject to EIA is legally required to produce this study before obtaining a building or operating permit.

steps.title: Baseline site assessment
steps.description: Inventory of environmental components: physical, biological, human and landscape settings. On-site measurements and secondary data.

steps.title: Impact analysis
steps.description: Identification, qualification and ranking of direct and indirect project impacts on environmental components. Temporary and permanent impacts.

steps.title: Mitigation measures
steps.description: Definition of suppression, reduction and compensation measures for significant impacts. Each measure is costed and scheduled.

steps.title: Monitoring programme
steps.description: Environmental monitoring indicators, inspection frequency, alert thresholds and Ministry reporting procedures.

deliverable.heading: Deliverable
deliverable.description: A structured EIA report, compliant with the Algerian regulatory template, ready for submission to the Wilaya Environment Directorate and the Directorate of Industry and Mines.

cta.heading: Does your project require an EIA?
cta.description: Send us the technical details of your project. We assess the study scope and provide a quote within 48 hours.

faq.a: Dès que votre projet figure sur la liste réglementaire des travaux soumis à étude d'impact (décret exécutif n° 07-145). L'EIE conditionne l'autorisation de construire ou d'exploiter.

faq.q: Combien de temps prend une EIE ?
faq.a: Selon l'ampleur et la sensibilité du site, de quelques semaines à quelques mois. Nous cadrons le délai dès la consultation initiale.
Les autorités de wilaya — Direction de l'Environnement (DEW) et Direction de l'Industrie et des Mines (DIM).

meta.title: Hazard Study (HS) for classified facilities — BTH Expert
meta.description: Accredited consultancy for hazard studies (HS) in Algeria: major-risk analysis, accident scenarios, effect zones and prevention plans. Based in Oran.

hero.heading: Hazard Study
hero.subheading: A hazard study identifies and characterises the major-accident risks of an industrial facility, assesses their consequences and defines the control measures. It is required for classified establishments subject to authorisation.

why.heading: Who is concerned?
why.description: Any operator of a classified facility for environmental protection subject to authorisation — hydrocarbon storage, petrochemical units, hazardous-material depots, pressure equipment — must produce a hazard study before commissioning and revise it at every substantial modification.

steps.title: Description & environment
steps.description: Characterisation of the facility, products, processes and the vulnerability of the surroundings: populations, sensitive environments and potential domino effects.

steps.title: Hazard identification
steps.description: Systematic analysis of hazard potentials using recognised methods (PHA, HAZOP), review of accident records and listing of dreaded scenarios.

steps.title: Risk analysis & modelling
steps.description: Quantification of major scenarios: thermal, overpressure and toxic effects, calculation of effect zones and mapping of separation distances.

steps.title: Risk control
steps.description: Definition of prevention and protection barriers, the internal emergency plan and response arrangements in the event of an accident.

deliverable.heading: Deliverable
deliverable.description: A hazard-study report compliant with the Algerian regulatory framework, including effect-zone mapping and the risk-control plan, ready for submission to the competent authorities.

cta.heading: Does your facility require a hazard study?
cta.description: Send us the characteristics of your facility and processes. We assess the study scope and provide a quote within 48 hours.

faq.a: Toute installation classée soumise à autorisation : stockage d'hydrocarbures, unités pétrochimiques, dépôts de produits dangereux, équipements sous pression.
Identification des dangers, modélisation des scénarios majeurs (effets thermiques, surpression, toxiques), cartographie des zones d'effet et plan de maîtrise des risques.
Oui — à chaque modification substantielle de l'installation, des procédés ou des produits mis en œuvre.

meta.title: HSE Audit & regulatory compliance — BTH Expert
meta.description: Health, safety and environment (HSE) audit and regulatory-compliance diagnosis for industrial sites in Algeria. Gap identification and prioritised action plan. Accredited consultancy in Oran.

hero.heading: HSE Audit & compliance
hero.subheading: An HSE audit establishes a site's compliance status against health, safety and environment requirements. It highlights regulatory gaps and prioritises the corrective actions to undertake.

why.heading: Who is concerned?
why.description: Any industrial or commercial site seeking to secure its regulatory compliance, prepare for an inspection, engage in an ISO 14001 / 45001 process, or control its HSE risks ahead of an acquisition, expansion or certification.

steps.title: Document review
steps.description: Analysis of existing permits, orders, registers and procedures against the regulatory obligations applicable to the site.

steps.title: Site visit
steps.description: Inspection of facilities, workstations and safety devices; interviews with managers and observation of actual practices.

steps.title: Gap analysis
steps.description: Comparison of the existing situation with legal and normative requirements, rating the criticality of each gap found.

steps.title: Prioritised action plan
steps.description: Costed and scheduled recommendations, ranked by risk level and regulatory deadline.

deliverable.heading: Deliverable
deliverable.description: A complete HSE audit report: regulatory-compliance grid, gap register and prioritised action plan — a steering tool for bringing the site into compliance.

cta.heading: Need an HSE audit?
cta.description: Describe your site and your compliance objectives. We define the audit scope and provide a quote within 48 hours.

faq.a: Avant une inspection, une certification ISO, une acquisition ou une extension — ou simplement pour sécuriser durablement votre conformité.
Une grille de conformité réglementaire, un registre des écarts et un plan d'action priorisé par niveau de risque.
Oui — revue documentaire puis visite de terrain, entretiens et observation des pratiques réelles.

meta.title: Environmental Management Plan (EMP) — BTH Expert
meta.description: Development of environmental management plans (EMP) to monitor mitigation measures across a project's whole life cycle. Accredited consultancy in Algeria, based in Oran.

hero.heading: Environmental Management Plan
hero.subheading: An environmental management plan turns the commitments of the impact assessment into concrete measures: it organises the mitigation, surveillance and monitoring of a project's effects, from the works phase to operation.

why.heading: Who is concerned?
why.description: Any project owner whose impact assessment has prescribed mitigation and monitoring measures, as well as operators required to demonstrate the proper implementation of their environmental commitments to the authorities.

steps.title: Framing the commitments
steps.description: Carrying over the mitigation and compensation measures from the impact assessment and translating them into assigned, scheduled operational actions.

steps.title: Surveillance programme
steps.description: Definition of indicators, parameters to be measured, control frequencies and alert thresholds for each environmental component.

steps.title: Monitoring system
steps.description: Organisation of responsibilities, reporting procedures and control arrangements during both the works and operation phases.

steps.title: Continuous improvement
steps.description: Mechanisms for review, updating of measures and handling of non-conformities throughout the project's life.

deliverable.heading: Deliverable
deliverable.description: An operational environmental management plan: measures matrix, surveillance and monitoring programme, indicators and reporting template — directly usable by the project teams.

cta.heading: Structure your environmental monitoring?
cta.description: Send us the requirements from your impact assessment. We build a management plan tailored to your project and provide a quote within 48 hours.

faq.a: Il traduit les engagements de l'étude d'impact en mesures concrètes : atténuation, surveillance et suivi sur toute la durée de vie du projet.
Tout porteur de projet dont l'étude d'impact a prescrit des mesures de suivi, et les exploitants tenus de démontrer leurs engagements.
Une matrice des mesures, un programme de surveillance, des indicateurs et un modèle de reporting exploitables par vos équipes.

detail.disclaimer: Representative example — details to be confirmed with the client.

cta.heading: A similar project?
cta.description: Describe your project and its context. We assess your obligations and provide a quote within 48 hours.

items.title: Impact assessment for a petrochemical complex
items.excerpt: EIA and hazard study for a petrochemical unit in the Arzew industrial zone.
items.contexte: Installation of a new processing unit within an existing industrial zone, close to third parties and sensitive environments. Subject to authorisation, the project required an environmental assessment and a characterisation of major risks before review.
items.demarche: Baseline site survey, analysis of impacts on air, water and the human environment, modelling of major-accident scenarios (thermal and overpressure effects) and definition of mitigation and risk-control measures.
items.resultat: A complete regulatory file — EIA and hazard study — submitted to the wilaya authorities, together with an environmental management plan and an internal emergency plan.

items.title: HSE audit & compliance for a cement plant
items.excerpt: Regulatory-compliance diagnosis and HSE action plan for an operating cement plant.
items.contexte: An operating cement plant sought to secure its regulatory compliance and structure its HSE approach ahead of an inspection by the competent authorities.
items.demarche: Document review of permits and registers, site visit, gap analysis against applicable requirements and prioritisation of corrective actions.
items.resultat: A compliance grid, a gap register and a prioritised action plan, supporting the site's compliance over twelve months.

items.title: Impact assessment for an irrigated area
items.excerpt: Environmental assessment and water-resource management for an agricultural irrigation project.
items.contexte: Development of an irrigated area drawing on water resources over a large agricultural footprint, with stakes for soils, natural environments and neighbouring uses.
items.demarche: Baseline characterisation, assessment of effects on water resources and soils, and definition of an environmental surveillance and monitoring programme.
items.resultat: A validated impact assessment and an operational environmental management plan for the works and operation phases.

items.q: Which projects require an environmental impact assessment in Algeria?
items.a: Any project listed under executive decree 07-145 (classified facilities, quarries, hydraulic projects, etc.) must undergo an EIA before any construction or operating permit can be granted.

items.q: How long does it take to obtain an environmental permit?
items.a: Allow 2 to 6 months depending on the scale of the project and the wilaya. The study itself takes from a few weeks to several months; the public inquiry phase (for large projects) extends the timeline.

items.q: Does BTH Expert operate outside Oran?
items.a: Yes. Based in Oran, we operate throughout Algeria, with a focus on western Algeria: Oran, Mostaganem, Tlemcen, Sidi Bel Abbès, Relizane and neighbouring wilayas.

items.q: What is a Ministry of Environment accreditation?
items.a: It is an official accreditation issued by the Ministry of Environment and Quality of Life, certifying that the consultancy is authorised to carry out EIAs and hazard studies. BTH Expert holds this accreditation.

items.q: How much does an environmental study cost?
items.a: The cost depends on the type of study, the scale of the project and its location. We provide a personalised quote after a free initial consultation. Contact us to discuss.
